title: The High Court at Patna (Establishment of a Permanent Bench at Ranchi) Act, 1976
full_text: The High Court at Patna (Establishment of a Permanent Bench at Ranchi) Act, 1976 पटना उच्‍च न्‍यायालय (रांची में स्‍थायी न्‍यायपीठ की स्‍थापना) अधिनियम, 1976 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197657 Act Number: 57 Enactment Date: 1976-04-08 Act Year: 1976 Short Title: The High Court at Patna (Establishment of a Permanent Bench at Ranchi) Act, 1976 Hindi Title: पटना उच्‍च न्‍यायालय (रांची में स्‍थायी न्‍यायपीठ की स्‍थापना) अधिनियम, 1976 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of a permanent bench of the High Court at Patna at Ranchi.
